series_metadata.series_description: Includes all records pertaining to the issuance of surety bonds including, but not limited to, pre-qualification records, funding verification, financial statements, bond issue documents and all other records filed with and related to the surety bonds.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain six (6) years after completion of project or such shorter limitations to bring claims if contractually agreed upon. For unsuccessful/unfunded applications and unexecuted projects: retain one (1) year after date of last action. Statutory or regulatory provisions applicable to certain programs may affect retention of related records. In such cases, the statutory or regulatory provisions shall take precedence over the retention language set forth in this schedule. Records subject to audit shall be further retained until audit report is released and discrepancies addressed. LITIGATION HOLD: Any records subject to a litigation hold must be retained until the hold is lifted by the Legal Office, regardless of whether the specified retention period has elapsed. ; Paper: Retain for period specified for electronic format, then destroy. If converted to electronic/digital format, paper records may be destroyed after verification of successful conversion., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
